metadata.description: Pratyabhijna Creative Engine (PCE) marketplace: a mechanism study of recursive self-reflexivity layers for LLM creative cognition. The plugin ships a five-shakti cascade (cit, ananda, iccha, jnana, kriya) with vimarsa shadow-revision and apohana negative-space refactoring, exposed through MCP tools, skills, agents, slash commands, and lifecycle hooks.

plugins.name: pratyabhijna-creative-engine
plugins.description: Run the cit -> ananda -> iccha -> apohana -> jnana -> kriya -> vimarsa cascade through MCP tools, skills, and agents. Targets poetry generation, poetry interpretation, divergent thinking, aspect-shift creativity, and free-energy-budget-gated cascade studies. Configurable model defaults via PCE_MODEL / PCE_JUDGE_MODEL or ~/.config/pce/config.toml.
